name: game
description: Core minigame hub for inventory, economy, boxes, and progression.
details: Use the `/game` group for your long-term account state: loadout, spores, purchases, boxes, and achievements.

name: optout
details: Stops passive systems until you use another game command to return.

name: inventory
description: Inspect your owned items and current loadout.
details: Shows what you own and what is currently equipped.

name: equip
description: Equip one of your owned items.
details: Equips a valid owned item into its matching slot.

name: unequip
details: Removes your currently equipped weapon, armor, or accessory.

name: shop
details: Shows the current stock and when it refreshes.

name: buy
description: Buy an item from the daily shop.
details: Spends spores to add the selected shop item to your inventory.

name: sell
description: Sell an owned item back for spores.
details: Returns part of the item value and removes it from your inventory.

name: stats
description: Check your spores and overall fight activity.
details: Summarizes your economy and accumulated combat participation.

name: leaderboard
details: Shows the strongest public standings by wins and spores.

name: boxes
details: Lists your current unopened rewards.

name: open
details: Opens the chosen reward container, or the oldest one if no ID is supplied.

name: achievements
details: Shows unlocked milestones and what you are close to earning next.

name: daily
details: Collect a flat spore payout once per day.

name: claim
details: Use it on open wellsprings; some are guarded and require a guardian fight first.

name: challenge
description: Challenge the current holder of a wellspring.
details: Fight for control of a held wellspring and contest its passive value.

name: wellsprings
details: Shows active locations, holders, rarity, expiry, and next action.

name: arena
description: Arena PvP hub for queueing, profiles, and ranked play.
details: Use the `/arena` group to queue for matches, inspect profiles, and track ladder progress.

name: ranked
details: Queues you for rating-affecting arena matches.

name: practice
details: Queues you for lower-stakes practice fights.

name: leave
details: Removes you from the queue if you have not been matched yet.

name: status
description: Check your Arena queue or profile status.
details: Shows whether you are queued and summarizes your current arena state.

name: leaderboard
details: Displays the top competitive Arena standings.

name: profile
details: Shows your own arena record or another player’s profile.
